text:
btree(3) core dumps on certain data sets.

Fix: 

I have found the fix method on the auther's home page.
	I confirmed the fix of above problem.

	Please apply these patch in this order.
	http://www.sleepycat.com/update/patch.1.2
	http://www.sleepycat.com/update/patch.1.3
	http://www.sleepycat.com/update/patch.1.4

	Information found on this page.
	http://www.sleepycat.com/update/patch.185.html
How-To-Repeat: 
	I have the reappear environment. But it needs large data and program.
